checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: Before redeploy, 16 tests passed, MDE parse checked 39 files, sample index check passed, and fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: public root UI
checks.evidence: Root URL returned Search Cranfield, Indexed Data, flow-diagram, and OpenSearch Query content.

checks.name: public metadata endpoint
checks.evidence: /api/cranfield/meta returned 1,400 documents and example query 'wing pressure distribution'.

checks.name: public latest search alias
checks.evidence: /api/search returned live cranfield-v0 results for 'wing pressure distribution'; top result id 652; total hits 794; API latency 275 ms; OpenSearch took 4 ms.

checks.name: public latest explain alias with retrievalFlow
checks.evidence: /api/explain returned six retrievalFlow steps and top result id 652 for 'wing pressure distribution'; API latency 71 ms; OpenSearch took 4 ms.

evidence_quality: Redeploy evidence confirms the current public Worker version is testable with the search UI, metadata endpoint, search API, and explain flow.
